highlights.summary: Release v0.8.0: aggregates multiple feature additions and fixes (anonymous opt-out telemetry; therapy settings upload to Tidepool; Nightscout glucose delete propagation; optional override/adjustment confirmation dialogs; show in-progress bolus and cancel from Treatments view; context menus for swipeable history items; settings search scroll-to and highlight; unified bolus safety checks; Nightscout site-change event fixes; glucose smoothing window fix; and submodule updates). The patch also updates Config.xcconfig APP_DEV_VERSION ultimately to 0.7.0.20.
highlights.userFacingImpact: This release bundles several user-visible features and bug fixes listed in the release notes (telemetry, Tidepool therapy settings upload, Nightscout delete propagation, UI/UX improvements, bolus safety/visibility, and algorithm fixes). In the repository config, APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig was incremented to 0.7.0.20 (previously 0.7.0.18 -> 0.7.0.19 in intermediate commits). If further verification of runtime behavior is required, human review is recommended.

items.summary: Release v0.8.0: aggregates multiple feature additions and fixes (anonymous opt-out telemetry; therapy settings upload to Tidepool; Nightscout glucose delete propagation; optional override/adjustment confirmation dialogs; show in-progress bolus and cancel from Treatments view; context menus for swipeable history items; settings search scroll-to and highlight; unified bolus safety checks; Nightscout site-change event fixes; glucose smoothing window fix; and submodule updates). The patch also updates Config.xcconfig APP_DEV_VERSION ultimately to 0.7.0.20.
items.userFacingImpact: This release bundles several user-visible features and bug fixes listed in the release notes (telemetry, Tidepool therapy settings upload, Nightscout delete propagation, UI/UX improvements, bolus safety/visibility, and algorithm fixes). In the repository config, APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig was incremented to 0.7.0.20 (previously 0.7.0.18 -> 0.7.0.19 in intermediate commits). If further verification of runtime behavior is required, human review is recommended.

items.summary: Adds an opt-out anonymous telemetry subsystem and UI. Implements a new TelemetryClient and TelemetryAttestor (App Attest-backed) under Services/Telemetry, wires scheduling and immediate send logic (recording cold launches, 24h recurring sends, and immediate send on build change or fresh opt-in), and integrates telemetry consent with existing Crashlytics crash-reporting. Introduces a three-state diagnostics consent (Full / Crash Reports Only / Disabled) with default Full (opt-out on fresh installs), a one-time migration sheet for existing users, Settings and Onboarding UI changes (including a "What's sent" TelemetryPreview), new persistent flags in PropertyPersistentFlags to track telemetry state, and updates PRIVACY_POLICY.md. Also adds the com.apple.developer.devicecheck.appattest-environment entitlement. Existing Crashlytics wiring is left unchanged.
items.userFacingImpact: Users will see a new diagnostics choice during onboarding and in Settings → App Diagnostics offering three options: Enable Full Sharing (crashes + anonymous usage telemetry), Crash Reports Only, or Disable Sharing. Existing users who previously completed onboarding are shown a one-time migration sheet on first foreground to choose telemetry consent. A "What's sent" preview lets users inspect the exact JSON payload. Telemetry is sent only when consented and is skipped on unsupported devices (e.g., simulator) and when the attestation registration is forbidden; crash reporting behavior remains controlled by the Crashlytics setting as before. If more detailed review of backend interactions or privacy/legal wording is required, human review may be appropriate.

sources.title: Add Anonymous Telemetry * Adds an opt-out anonymous usage check-in modeled on LoopFollow#626 * Diagnostics consent now has three states: Full Sharing (crashes + telemetry), Crash Reports Only, and Disabled. Default is Full Sharing (opt-out) * Existing Crashlytics wiring is unchanged * Add new  flag * Onboarding and Settings → App Diagnostics show the new selection option * Existing users get a one-time migration sheet on first foreground. * New TelemetryClient lives under Services/Telemetry * Extended PRIVACY_POLICY.md with Telemetry section
Add Apple App Attest auth to telemetry uploader
Add Trio Telemetry URL, adjust docstring
Fix registry by now decoing the mobileprovision blob via .isoLatin1
Handle stale attest and registry keys by dropping them client-sided
Add reset button, invalidInput self-heal, and diagnostic logging for app attest

items.summary: Adds a dedicated NumberFormatter (basalFormatter) to TherapySettingEditorView and uses it to format .unitPerHour values. The formatter sets minimumFractionDigits = 2 and maximumFractionDigits = 3. The .unitPerHour case in the value formatting switch was moved to return basalFormatter.string(from: decimalValue as NSNumber) instead of falling through to the prior decimalValue.description path. Changes are in Trio/Sources/Modules/Onboarding/View/TherapySettingEditorView.swift.
items.userFacingImpact: Displayed basal rates for the unitPerHour unit in the onboarding TherapySettingEditorView will now be formatted with a minimum of 2 and a maximum of 3 fractional digits (using the new basalFormatter) instead of using decimalValue.description. This will change the visual rounding/precision for small basal steps; the diff does not show other behavioral changes, but a human review may be desired to confirm no unintended side effects in other code paths.

includedPullRequests.title: Add Anonymous Telemetry
includedPullRequests.body: ## Overview * Adds an opt-out anonymous usage check-in modeled on LoopFollow#626 * Diagnostics consent now has three states: Full Sharing (crashes + telemetry), Crash Reports Only, and Disabled. Default is Full Sharing (opt-out) * Existing Crashlytics wiring is unchanged * Add new flag * Onboarding and Settings → App Diagnostics show the new selection option * Existing users get a one-time migration sheet on first foreground. * New TelemetryClient lives under Services/Telemetry - `TelemetryAttestor` owns `DCAppAttestService` key generation (Secure Enclave-backed), Keychain-persisted registration, and per-ping assertion building. - `TelemetryClient.send()` skips on `DCAppAttestService.isSupported == false` (simulator), short-circuits on a sticky "forbidden" flag set by a 403 from `/api/attest/register`, and posts to `/checkin` with the three `X-AppAttest-*` headers. Assertion is built over `SHA256(payload || challenge)` per the server spec. - `app_id` (`TEAMID.bundle.id`) is read from the embedded `embedded.mobileprovision` file. The `SecTask*` APIs aren't Swift-exposed on iOS; this is the standard workaround. Trio always ships with an embedded mobileprovision (sideload / TestFlight), so this path is reliable. - Added the `com.apple.developer.devicecheck.appattest-environment = development` entitlement (matching the existing `aps-environment`). * Extended PRIVACY_POLICY.md with Telemetry section This PR is still draft until the server side is reviewed in tandem. ## Screenshots | Onboarding | Migration Popup | Settings | |--------|--------|--------| | | | | ## TODOs - [x] Update endpoint once telemetry backend is set up - [x] Test check-in pings and upload end-to-end

Assertion is built over `SHA256(payload || challenge)` per the server spec. - `app_id` (`TEAMID.bundle.id`) is read from the embedded `embedded.mobileprovision` file. The `SecTask*` APIs aren't Swift-exposed on iOS; this is the standard workaround. Trio always ships with an embedded mobileprovision (sideload / TestFlight), so this path is reliable. - Added the `com.apple.developer.devicecheck.appattest-environment = development` entitlement (matching the existing `aps-environment`). * Extended PRIVACY_POLICY.md with Telemetry section This PR is still draft until the server side is reviewed in tandem. ## Screenshots | Onboarding | Migration Popup | Settings | |--------|--------|--------| | | | | ## TODOs - [x] Update endpoint once telemetry backend is set up - [x] Test check-in pings and upload end-to-end

includedPullRequests.title: Release/v0.8.0
includedPullRequests.body:
**For detailed release notes, see: https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/releases/tag/v0.8.0**

## What's Changed At A Glance

* **Anonymous opt-out Telemetry**: helps the team understand how Trio is used, backed by Apple App Attest
* **Therapy settings upload to Tidepool**: Trio now pushes basal, CR, ISF, and target settings into Tidepool alongside treatment data
* **Delete glucose from Nightscout**: glucose entries deleted in Trio now propagate to Nightscout
* **Override confirmation dialogs**: optional confirmation step before activating an override or temporary target
* **Bolus progress in Treatments view**: see the active bolus and cancel it without leaving the Treatments screen
* **Context menus** on all swipeable history list items (long-press alternative to swipe)
* **Settings Search scroll-to and highlight**: tapping a search result now scrolls to and briefly highlights the matched row
* **Bolus safety checks unified**: Shortcut-driven boluses now get the same max-bolus, max-IOB, and recent-bolus validation as APNS remote boluses
* **Nightscout site change events corrected**: fixed false positives for Medtronic, added a proper `SiteChange` event for Trio History
* **Glucose smoothing window fix**: smoothing now correctly uses the *newest* 350 readings, not the oldest
* **Submodule updates**: OmniBLE (pod keep-alive now part of `main`), DanaKit, MedtrumKit, CGMBLEKit


## All PRs Contained in v0.8.0

| PR | Title | Author |
|---|---|---|
| [#682](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/682) | Fix Nightscout site change events (primarily Medtronic & Medtrum) | [@MikePlante1](https://github.com/MikePlante1) |
| [#975](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/975) | Add therapy settings upload to Tidepool | [@blalezarian](https://github.com/blalezarian) |
| [#980](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/980) | Fix: Delete glucose entries in Nightscout API | [@ryceg](https://github.com/ryceg) |
| [#1050](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1050) | Fix enteredBy handling: remote vs. local behavior | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1051](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1051) | Add scroll-to and highlight for settings search (core) | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1094](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1094) | Add settingsHighlightScroll modifier to all settings sub-screens | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1096](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1096) | Add scroll targets and fix search index labels | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1108](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1108) | Shared BolusSafetyValidator for APNS and Shortcut boluses | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1111](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1111) | Add optional override/adjustment confirmation dialogs | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1113](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1113) | Sync submodules: OmniBLE, DanaKit, MedtrumKit | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1117](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1117) | Fix typo in Dynamic ISF help sheet title | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1118](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1118) | Smoothing: fix fetch to use newest 350 values | [@mountrcg](https://github.com/mountrcg) |
| [#1120](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1120) | Add context menus for swipeable history list items | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1123](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1123) | Fix delete button role in history swipe actions | [@MikePlante1](https://github.com/MikePlante1) |
| [#1124](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1124) | Fix glucose date encoding: use Int not String in AlgorithmGlucose | [@kingst](https://github.com/kingst) |
| [#1127](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1127) | Refactor History module: split files; add confirmation dialogs | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1130](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1130) | Show in-progress bolus on Treatments screen | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1132](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1132) | Fix empty help sheet on first cold tap | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1133](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1133) | Update Fastlane to 2.233.1 | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1136](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1136) | Sync submodules: CGMBLEKit, DanaKit, OmniBLE, MedtrumKit | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1149](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1149) | Add Anonymous Telemetry | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1155](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1155) | Translation updates from Crowdin | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1158](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1158) | Fix help buttons on Dynamic Settings page | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1161](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1161) | Fix basal rounding for small basal steps | [@bastiaanv](https://github.com/bastiaanv) |
| [#1164](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1164) | Fix Apple Health flag for telemetry | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1165](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1165) | Settings Search with scroll-to and highlight (final integration) | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1166](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1166) | Linting fix | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |

**For detailed release notes, see: https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/releases/tag/v0.8.0**

## What's Changed At A Glance

* **Anonymous opt-out Telemetry**: helps the team understand how Trio is used, backed by Apple App Attest
* **Therapy settings upload to Tidepool**: Trio now pushes basal, CR, ISF, and target settings into Tidepool alongside treatment data
* **Delete glucose from Nightscout**: glucose entries deleted in Trio now propagate to Nightscout
* **Override confirmation dialogs**: optional confirmation step before activating an override or temporary target
* **Bolus progress in Treatments view**: see the active bolus and cancel it without leaving the Treatments screen
* **Context menus** on all swipeable history list items (long-press alternative to swipe)
* **Settings Search scroll-to and highlight**: tapping a search result now scrolls to and briefly highlights the matched row
